top_strategic.title: Equipment Durability Intelligence — Sell to Manufacturers
top_strategic.evidence: We track EVERY paddle, shoe, and court surface across 3,655 clips. Over time, we can correlate equipment wear patterns with performance drop-offs and injury risk. Sell this intel to JOOLA, Nike, adidas, etc. as a 'durability research subscription.' Manufacturers get real failure-mode data; we get paid $50K-200K/year per brand; players optionally share serial numbers for a discount on replacements. This flips the model: instead of detecting their brands, they're funding our research.

top_strategic.title: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
top_strategic.evidence: The camera sees these items but we detect no brands. ZERO detections: accessories, apparel, footwear, wristband. Near-zero: sunglasses(2). Each gap = a brand that could be paying for visibility data.
top_strategic.action: Add shoe/apparel/sunglasses brand detection examples to Gemini prompt — immediate revenue unlock

top_strategic.title: Coaching Bootcamp — Rapid-Cycle Video Bounties
top_strategic.evidence: We identify high-engagement rallies with one correctable flaw. We invite 5-10 coaches to submit 60-second 'correction clips' in <6 hours. We publish all of them, let players vote/rate, pay coaches algorithmically based on votes + our quality score, repeat weekly. Coaches get reputation + income; we get rapid content production; players get diverse teaching styles. The loop: more coaches → faster iteration → better content → more players → higher bounty payouts → attracts better coaches.

top_strategic.title: 1/14 clips appear STAGED in the video — authenticity risk
top_strategic.evidence: Gemini video analysis flagged 1 clips as staged footage (vs 13 spontaneous, 0 unclear). Staged content may undercut the 'real play' brand story.
top_strategic.action: Tag staged clips in the corpus; exclude from 'authentic gameplay' brand assets.

top_strategic.title: Production reality: 12/14 clips are 'amateur' — not broadcast
top_strategic.evidence: Gemini's visual assessment of production level across 14 clips: amateur=12, semi-pro=1, pro=1
top_strategic.action: Brand pitches should price the actual production tier buyers are seeing, not the aspirational one.

top_data.title: Viral shot: 'overhead' clips average 5.12 viral vs 'none' at 1
top_data.evidence: Shot viral averages: overhead=5.12, speed_up=4.27, reset=3.92, volley=3.56, dink=2.96, drive=2.89, serve=2.18, unknown=1.2, none=1
top_data.action: Prioritize highlight reels featuring high-viral shot types

top_data.title: Prompt fix: 5 badges consistently missed — add positive examples
top_data.evidence: Production awards these but DaaS misses them: 'rally master' (6 missed), 'new look' (5 missed), 'steady eddie' (4 missed), 'paddle tap celebration' (3 missed), 'fresh fit' (3 missed). These are real badges that our prompt doesn't detect.
top_data.action:
Add positive examples to Gemini prompt:
'When analyzing badges, make sure to check for these commonly missed badges:
  - rally master: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - new look: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - steady eddie: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - paddle tap celebration: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - fresh fit: Look for [describe visual pattern]

top_data.title: Worst predicted badges: third shot drop artist (F1=0.962), hustler (F1=0.919)
top_data.evidence: Lowest F1 badges: third shot drop artist (F1=0.962), hustler (F1=0.919). These need prompt improvement.
top_data.action: Add specific examples for these badge types in Gemini prompt

top_data.title: DaaS badge prediction: F1=0.98 (precision=0.99, recall=0.98)
top_data.evidence: Across 477 verified clips: 1867 correct predictions, 16 false positives, 41 missed badges. Overall F1=0.985.
top_data.action: Target recall improvement: add more badge examples to Gemini prompt

top_data.title: Video reveals 53 patterns metadata never saw
top_data.evidence: Across 14 clips, Gemini video analysis surfaced 53 visual observations flagged as novel vs the text metadata. Sample: The player in the green shorts performs an aggressive, acrobatic smash that appears to be a dive or a very low; The player in green shorts exhibits a quick, fluid transition from a defensive squat to an offensive upward sw; The player in red shorts has a slightly more casual stance and paddle grip, contrasting with the intense focus
top_data.action: Feed these patterns back into the metadata extraction prompt — they represent systematic blind spots in text-only analysis.

all_findings.title: Metadata quality drifts from video reality by 0.7 pts on average
all_findings.evidence: Across 14 clips, Gemini video-based quality ratings differ from metadata by avg -0.7. 4 clips have metadata OVERSTATING quality (>=2pt lie); 1 UNDERSTATING.
all_findings.action: Re-train or re-prompt the metadata quality signal — it's drifting from what humans actually see on screen.

all_findings.title: Signature moves = viral gold: 3625 clips with signatures avg 3.0 viral vs 3.9
all_findings.evidence: 3625 clips have identified signature moves, averaging 3.0 viral vs 3.9 for clips without.
all_findings.action: Auto-tag signature move clips as premium content

all_findings.title: Coaching Bootcamp — Rapid-Cycle Video Bounties
all_findings.evidence: We identify high-engagement rallies with one correctable flaw. We invite 5-10 coaches to submit 60-second 'correction clips' in <6 hours. We publish all of them, let players vote/rate, pay coaches algorithmically based on votes + our quality score, repeat weekly. all_findings.action: Evaluate: creator_economy play

all_findings.title: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
all_findings.evidence: Brands with significant venue-only detections (not product use): JOOLA (469/6072 are venue), Nicol (6/14 are venue), PUSHIT (5/9 are venue), adidas (4/47 are venue), Onix (3/40 are venue). Raw counts overstate market share. Product-use only: JOOLA=5603, Nike=611, PICKLEBALL=182, Reolink=107, HEAD=105.
all_findings.action: Report TRUE share-of-court (product-use only) to brand partners, not raw detection counts

all_findings.title: Viral formula: quality (7.41 vs 4.68) + watchability (6.79 vs 2.73)
all_findings.evidence: Top 100 viral clips: quality=7.41, watchability=6.79. Bottom 100: quality=4.68, watchability=2.73. Both metrics track strongly with viral potential.
all_findings.action: Use (quality + watchability) / 2 as quick viral prediction score

all_findings.title: Body language signals present in 8/14 clips — untapped signal
all_findings.evidence: Gemini video flagged body-language cues (celebrations, frustration, gestures) in 8 clips that metadata scores don't capture. These correlate with viral potential beyond shot mechanics.
all_findings.action: Add a 'body_language' detection pass to the extraction pipeline — these signals predict shareability.

all_findings.title: Rally length matters: long rallies are more viral (long=3.1 vs short=2.2)
all_findings.evidence: Avg rally: 15.7 shots. Long rallies (15+): 1886 clips, avg viral 3.1. Short (4-): 61 clips, avg viral 2.2.
all_findings.action: Use rally length as a quality signal in highlight curation

all_findings.title: Prompt fix: JOOLA appears in 351/477 verified clips — add disambiguation
all_findings.evidence: JOOLA dominates 74% of clips. Prompt should distinguish: paddle logo (real JOOLA use), net logo (JOOLA sponsors nets), and venue branding (JOOLA sponsors the facility).
all_findings.action:
Add to brand detection prompt:
'For JOOLA specifically, classify detection source:
  - paddle: JOOLA logo on paddle face = confirmed product use
  - net: JOOLA logo on net = venue sponsorship, NOT product use
  - venue: JOOLA on walls/banners = facility sponsorship
Only count paddle detections as brand_category: paddle'

all_findings.title: 1/14 clips appear STAGED in the video — authenticity risk
all_findings.evidence: Gemini video analysis flagged 1 clips as staged footage (vs 13 spontaneous, 0 unclear). Staged content may undercut the 'real play' brand story.
all_findings.action: Tag staged clips in the corpus; exclude from 'authentic gameplay' brand assets.

all_findings.title: Production reality: 12/14 clips are 'amateur' — not broadcast
all_findings.evidence: Gemini's visual assessment of production level across 14 clips: amateur=12, semi-pro=1, pro=1
all_findings.action: Brand pitches should price the actual production tier buyers are seeing, not the aspirational one.

all_findings.title: Top content creators: PickleBill leads with 557 clips
all_findings.evidence:
PickleBill: 557 clips, viral=3.2, Steady Eddie
Chintan: 186 clips, viral=3.4, Dink Specialist
Tmf: 105 clips, viral=3.4, Steady Eddie
Ironvarr: 98 clips, viral=3.3, Kitchen Master
Coach_Block: 92 clips, viral=2.9, Steady Eddie
all_findings.action: Create player spotlight feature for top contributors

all_findings.title: Viral arc: 'top_play' is 160.0x more likely in top clips (16.0% vs 0.0%)
all_findings.evidence: Story arc 'top_play' appears in 16.0% of top-viral clips but only 0.0% of bottom-viral clips.
all_findings.action: Prioritize 'top_play' clips in automated highlight reels

all_findings.title: Longitudinal tracking possible: 69 players with 5+ clips
all_findings.evidence: 69 players have enough data for improvement tracking. Top: PickleBill(557), Chintan(186), Tmf(105), Ironvarr(98), Coach_Block(92)
all_findings.action: Build player improvement trajectory product — track skill changes over time

connections.strategic_finding: Equipment Durability Intelligence — Sell to Manufacturers
connections.data_finding: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Equipment Durability Intelligence — Sell' with 'Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — t' for a targeted product.

product_concept.name: CourtShare Analytics
product_concept.first_screen: Dashboard showing a manufacturer's equipment deployed across venues with two metrics side-by-side: 'Raw Brand Mentions' (inflated counts from net/venue branding bias) vs. 'True Market Share' (adjusted for venue-specific bias patterns). A red/green indicator flags which venues are over-indexing specific brands.
product_concept.why_powerful: Manufacturers can price and allocate inventory based on actual court share, not inflated sponsorship data, recovering 15-30% margin leakage from misallocated stock.

connections.data_finding: Viral shot: 'overhead' clips average 5.12 viral vs 'none' at 1
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Coaching Bootcamp — Rapid-Cycle Video Bo' with 'Viral shot: 'overhead' clips average 5.1' for a targeted product.

product_concept.name: ShotViral Bounty Board
product_concept.first_screen: A feed of open 'shot bounties' ($50-500) posted by coaches, filtered by shot type (overhead, three-point, etc.) with a viral probability score displayed—'Overhead shots: 5.1x more viral.' Creators upload 15-30 second clips and earn payouts based on views hit within 48 hours.
product_concept.why_powerful: Coaches get production-ready, high-viral-probability coaching content in 2 days instead of 2 weeks, while creators monetize micro-content in a structured, data-backed marketplace.

connections.data_finding: Signature moves = viral gold: 3625 clips with signatures avg 3.0 viral vs 3.9
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Coaching Bootcamp — Rapid-Cycle Video Bo' with 'Signature moves = viral gold: 3625 clips' for a targeted product.

product_concept.name: SignatureMove Studio
product_concept.first_screen: A creator dashboard titled 'Build Your Signature.' Users film one repeatable move (crossover, spin, etc.), tag it as a 'signature,' and the system queues it into a weekly viral bounty pool. Real-time counter shows '3,625 signature clips trending—avg 3.0x viral lift vs. standard moves.'
product_concept.why_powerful: Players monetize signature moves by encoding personal brand identity into bounceable content, with 3x viral multiplier making them 3x more likely to get sponsored or recruited.

connections.data_finding: Rally length matters: long rallies are more viral (long=3.1 vs short=2.2)
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Coaching Bootcamp — Rapid-Cycle Video Bo' with 'Rally length matters: long rallies are m' for a targeted product.
